name: manage_sending_domains
description: Create, list, and verify sending domains in SparkPost. Before you can send email from a domain, you must add it and verify ownership through DNS records (DKIM or CNAME). SparkPost can auto-generate DKIM keys for you. You can also check verification status and manage domain settings.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: The domain name to register for sending. Required when creating a new domain.

parameters.name: generate_dkim
parameters.description: Whether to auto-generate a DKIM key pair. Default: true.

parameters.name: dkim_key_length
parameters.description: DKIM key size in bits. Default: 1024. Use 2048 for stronger security.

parameters.name: tracking_domain
parameters.description: Associate a tracking domain with this sending domain.

parameters.name: shared_with_subaccounts
parameters.description: Whether this domain is available to subaccounts.

parameters.name: ownership_verified
parameters.description: Filter for listing: only return domains with this verification status.

sub_endpoints.description: Verify a sending domain via DNS
